home.subtitle: Let's protect your skin
home.medical_warning_text: This app does not provide medical diagnosis or replace professional consultation. Always consult a dermatologist for accurate evaluation.

scan.title: New Analysis
scan.tip_1: Center the lesion in the photo
scan.tip_5: Keep a distance of 10–15 cm from the skin

assessment.title: Assessment Result
assessment.simulated_notice: Simulated preview: the final AI model is not integrated yet.
assessment.demo_selector_label: Select a risk scenario for demo
assessment.risk_low_desc: No strong warning signs were identified. Keep monitoring and repeat the scan if changes appear.
assessment.risk_moderate_desc: There are signs that justify professional evaluation. We recommend contacting medical support.
assessment.risk_high_desc: Higher concern signs were identified. Please seek medical help as soon as possible.
assessment.missing_data_desc: There is no submitted image yet to show results.

learn.title: Educational mini-challenges
learn.subtitle: Learn key warning signs and earn points through short challenges.
learn.already_completed: This challenge is already completed. No extra points can be earned.
learn.select_answer: Please select an answer before submitting.
learn.wrong_answer: Incorrect answer. Review the content and try again.
learn.challenge1_content: A: Asymmetry, B: Irregular borders, C: Multiple colors, D: Diameter above 6mm, E: Evolution over time.
learn.challenge2_content: Choose the best answer for identifying suspicious lesions.
learn.challenge2_question: Which sign should prompt medical evaluation?
learn.challenge2_opt1: A mole that quickly changed color and size over recent weeks.
learn.challenge2_opt2: A stable mole with no changes for years.
learn.challenge2_opt3: A spot that disappeared on its own after a few days.
learn.challenge3_content: Use SPF 30+ every day, reapply every 2 hours outdoors, and combine with a hat/protective clothing.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: To help you take care of your skin, we need to process some data. Here is how we do it simply:

topics.identity_desc: We store your name, date of birth, and health history to personalize scan frequency recommendations. Our system suggests when to examine your skin based on your risk profile.
topics.photos_desc: The photos you take of your lesions never leave your phone. Processing is done locally to ensure that no one but you has access to these images.
topics.admin_desc: Platform administrators only manage statistical data and the challenge system. They do not have access to your private medical images or diagnoses.
topics.purpose_desc: The sole purpose of processing this data is the prevention and monitoring of your skin health, encouraging healthy habits through challenges and reminders.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using Nevo, you agree to the following conditions of use to ensure your safety and the platform's effectiveness:

topics.medical_desc: Nevo is an awareness tool. AI results are indicative and do not, under any circumstances, replace direct observation by a dermatologist.
topics.usage_desc: The user commits to providing truthful data and using image capture as instructed to ensure the best possible analysis.
topics.liability_desc: The platform is not responsible for self-diagnosis. If you notice any change in a lesion, you must seek immediate medical assistance.
